objective: Human-executable field-day layer over certified route cards.

execution_model.promotion_gap_policy: Loops without an audit-clean route_card_ref, or with route-card audit blockers, stay visible as promotion/audit gaps and are not publication-ready.
execution_model.timing_authority: Single-loop field days use the certified route-card door-to-door p75/p90 unless an explicit override explains the calendar value. Multi-start field days keep the calendar assignment/certificate as day-level timing authority.
execution_model.availability_authority: P90 capacity is represented as a dated bound on each field day. Weekday/weekend labels are context only and are not capacity proof.
